## Headroom Learned Patterns
*Auto-generated by `headroom learn` on 2026-05-12 — do not edit manually*

### Large Files — Navigate with grep/awk
*~4,500 tokens/session saved*
- `src/server/routes/applicant.ts` is 1500+ lines; full reads will hit the runtime limit. Use `grep -n` to find route boundaries, then `awk 'NR>=X && NR<=Y'` to read specific sections.
- `src/features/applicants-tracker/components/add-applicant-dialog.tsx` regularly exceeds 19 KB; read with `offset`/`limit` or grep for the specific section needed rather than loading the whole file.

<!-- headroom:learn:end -->
